title: Native render descriptor
description: The JSON a native introspection probe (the JUCE design probe) emits and the apple-hig reviewer's native path consumes. Geometry is in root-LOGICAL coordinates; `measurable:false` marks a custom-painted / non-introspectable node that must NOT be contrast-scored.

shown.description: editor attached to a native peer (a11y available only when true)

axCoverageRatio.description: fraction of nodes with accessibility data

value.description: control value, kept separate from label

measurable.description: false = custom-painted; exclude from contrast scoring

states.description: State-sweep samples (Task S3, additive/optional). Keys are state names — normal/over/down/disabled/toggledOn/toggledOff are the sweep vocabulary, but unknown keys are accepted permissively; every VALUE is strictly shaped. `normal` is REQUIRED whenever states is present (always sampled).

recipe.description: Address into the parsed macOS control recipes (tier-3 diff). An element carrying a recipe MUST also carry `appearance` — see the object-level conditional below (prevents a Dark app silently diffing against a Light recipe via the default).

appearance.description: the appearance the sweep was sampled under; required when `recipe` is present

primary.description: the control is a primary action / prominent CTA — raises inert-state findings to high severity

allOf.$comment: An element with a recipe must also declare its appearance (S2 review): a Dark app must not silently diff against the Light recipe via the default.

sweep.description: Top-level sweep summary (additive/optional): how many controls were swept, plus the proven-unforceable blind spots and the declared restore-safe side effects.

blindSpots.description: proven-unforceable states (window-inactive, focus-when-unfocused, hover on non-Buttons) — inherited into the report under invariant C

sideEffects.description: unsuppressable but restore-safe effects the sweep declares (state listeners, async Value callbacks, focus move on disable)

stateSample.description: one swept state: mean colour + mean composite alpha + an optional coarse 4x4 (16-entry) downsample grid

grid.description: 4x4 downsample; optional (the probe may omit it), exactly 16 rgb triplets when present
